name: cross-review-bridge
description: Human-approved cross-review workflows between Codex Desktop and external AI review surfaces.

interface.shortDescription: Cross-check project work through an approved external reviewer.
interface.longDescription: Prepare compact local project briefs, route them through a human-approved external AI review channel, then synthesize and verify feedback back in Codex Desktop.
defaultPrompt: Use Cross Review Bridge to run a project review.
Use Cross Review Bridge to cross-check this bug.
Use Cross Review Bridge to synthesize external feedback.
